questions.question: During a Drop-Tune Manoeuvre, what is the minimum duration required for the contact-exclusion field to clear after the asset releases an object, and how is this rhythm taught to new operatives?

choices.label: A
choices.text: 0.5 seconds; using a visual strobe light cue

choices.label: B
choices.text: 0.3 seconds; using a metronome cue

choices.label: C
choices.text: 1.2 seconds; using a tactile vibration cue

choices.label: D
choices.text: 1.0 seconds; using a digital countdown timer

questions.explanation: Section 5.5 states that the contact-exclusion field clears ~0.3 seconds after the asset releases an object, and Cell Halcón training videos use a metronome cue to instill this rhythm in new operatives.

questions.question: According to the Doctrine of Sequential Suspension (DSS), what is identified as the core vulnerability, and what specific window must be protected above all?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Cooldown discipline; the 4.0-second recovery window

choices.label: B
choices.text: Tail momentum; the 0.3-second release window

choices.label: C
choices.text: Acquisition; the 1.2-second targeting window

choices.label: D
choices.text: Sequential activation; the 60-second operational window

questions.explanation: Principle 3 of the Doctrine of Sequential Suspension states: 'Acquisition is the vulnerability. Protect the 1.2-second targeting window above all.'

questions.question: Since 2022, how many violations of the Three-Two-One Rule have been documented, and how many of those resulted in operational anomalies?

choices.label: A
choices.text: 5 documented violations, with 3 producing operational anomalies

choices.label: B
choices.text: 7 documented violations, with 5 producing operational anomalies

choices.label: C
choices.text: 12 documented violations, with 7 producing operational anomalies

choices.label: D
choices.text: 9 documented violations, with 6 producing operational anomalies

questions.explanation: Section 5.2 states that there have been 7 documented violations of the Three-Two-One Rule since 2022, of which 5 produced operational anomalies.

questions.question: What is the primary tactical purpose of the Drop-Tune Manoeuvre as described in the operational doctrine?

choices.label: A
choices.text: To bypass the 12-meter visibility limit during whiteout conditions

choices.label: B
choices.text: To permit a meaningful one-second window between release and engagement target acquisition

choices.label: C
choices.text: To achieve multi-baton strikes using the tertiary Hold ability

choices.label: D
choices.text: To extend the maximum duration of a single suspension to 4 seconds

questions.explanation: Section 5.5 specifies that the Drop-Tune Manoeuvre 'permits a meaningful one-second window between release and engagement target acquisition.'

questions.question: Under the Doctrine of Sequential Suspension (DSS), what defines the lethal application of suspensions?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Ordered chains of three suspensions

choices.label: B
choices.text: A single decisive suspension activation

choices.label: C
choices.text: Continuous suspension maintained for up to 12 seconds

choices.label: D
choices.text: Four simultaneous activations within a 60-second window

questions.explanation: Principle 2 of the Doctrine of Sequential Suspension states: 'Sequence determines lethality. A single suspension rarely wins an engagement; ordered chains of three define the doctrine.'

questions.question: Who is responsible for auditing the standardized provisioning of the asset's operational safehouses?

choices.label: A
choices.text: The Director-General

choices.label: B
choices.text: Cpl. Vendrame

choices.label: C
choices.text: Hermana Mendieta

choices.label: D
choices.text: Cell Cóndor Logistics Team

questions.explanation: According to Section 8.3, safehouse provisioning is audited semi-annually by Cpl. Vendrame on behalf of the cell.

questions.question: What is the specific operational function designated for the Annex Trelew secondary base in Argentina?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Quarterly senior briefings and rotation headquarters

choices.label: B
choices.text: Field office for Bolivian altiplano operations

choices.label: C
choices.text: Logistics-only annex for southern operations

choices.label: D
choices.text: Regional CBMP medical office and testing

questions.explanation: Section 8.2 lists Annex Trelew's function as a 'Logistics-only annex, southern operations'.

questions.question: For what reason is the Cerro Castillo exclusion ring (1.6 km radius) restricted, and what is the asset's current status regarding this zone?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Jurisdictional conflict; the asset has not been authorized to enter since 2018

choices.label: B
choices.text: Strategic investigation; limited access is permitted with prior coordination

choices.label: C
choices.text: Psychological reasons based on CBMP recommendation; the asset has not entered since 2020

choices.label: D
choices.text: Environmental contamination; the zone has been completely sealed off since 2023

questions.explanation: Section 8.6 states that the Cerro Castillo exclusion ring is restricted due to 'Psychological; CBMP recommendation' and the status is 'The asset has not entered since 2020'.

questions.question: According to the redundancy requirements of the PAMC Yatiri network, what is required for each cell-led operation?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Line-of-comms to at least 2 nodes

choices.label: B
choices.text: Direct uplink to the primary Yatiri relay node at Cuartel Valparaíso

choices.label: C
choices.text: A minimum of 3 active backup satellite uplinks

choices.label: D
choices.text: A dual-handset Yatiri-2 relay connection

questions.explanation: Section 8.7 states: 'each cell-led operation requires line-of-comms to at least 2 nodes.'

questions.question: What protocol must be followed when an operation is conducted outside the coverage of the 8 burst-relay nodes in the PAMC Yatiri network?

choices.label: A
choices.text: The asset must transition to a pre-established micro-cache communication set

choices.label: B
choices.text: The operation must be aborted and rescheduled within 36 months

choices.label: C
choices.text: The asset must obtain satellite uplink and Director's authorization

choices.label: D
choices.text: Bilateral coordination with the Peruvian DAM is required

questions.explanation: Section 8.7 states: 'Operations outside relay coverage require satellite uplink and Director's authorization.'
